response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks entry-level alignment: they hold a senior title with 10+ years of experience, predominantly use TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, have only minimal Java exposure, and possess basic (not proficient) German — a hard requirement for client-facing roles in Germany's insurance sector.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong contributions to open-source and community education initiatives
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: Overqualified with senior experience, not entry-level as required
Primary language is TypeScript/Node.js; Java experience is minimal and unverified
German language proficiency is only basic, failing the core communication requirement
